response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio does NOT match the Reference JSON. The provided lyrics were for 'Kirameki Rider', but the video contains a medley of 'Prism Melody', 'Palette', and 'Story Time'. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was ignored due to the mismatch; manual transcription and translation were performed for 100% of the audible vocals. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal bursts. Explicit start times are set for each phrase to prevent cascading delays, and transitions between songs in the medley are handled with distinct blocks.

subtitles.original: Prism Melody
subtitles.english: [Song: Prism Melody]

subtitles.original: ハーモニー 手を伸ばしたら
subtitles.english: Harmony, once I reach out my hand

subtitles.original: 足跡に虹がかかる
subtitles.english: A rainbow appears over my footprints

subtitles.original: 君と晴れる 打ち抜くようなステージ
subtitles.english: Clearing up with you on this striking stage

subtitles.original: ハーモニー 印した場所へ
subtitles.english: Harmony, towards the place we marked

subtitles.original: 運ぶ約束を 輝きに乗せて
subtitles.english: Carrying our promise, riding on the radiance

subtitles.original: 世界へ響け メロディ
subtitles.english: Resonate to the world, melody

subtitles.original: いつまでも 君と
subtitles.english: Forever, with you

subtitles.original: 君と踏み出したあの一歩 あの瞬間が
subtitles.english: That one step I took with you, that moment

subtitles.original: 宝物だって胸を張る今
subtitles.english: Now I can proudly say it's a treasure

subtitles.original: 歩いて 走って はしゃいで 笑って行くんだ
subtitles.english: Walking, running, frolicking, laughing, we go on

subtitles.original: 色褪せないまま
subtitles.english: While staying unfaded

subtitles.original: 混ざり合う 僕らの声 ほら
subtitles.english: Our voices mixing together, look

subtitles.original: 聴こえてる
subtitles.english: I can hear it

subtitles.original: ハーモニー 重ねたことが
subtitles.english: Harmony, the things we've layered

subtitles.original: 鮮やかな日々の向こう
subtitles.english: Beyond the vivid days

subtitles.original: ずっと君と 彩る物語
subtitles.english: A story colored forever with you

subtitles.original: ハーモニー 結んだ夢が
subtitles.english: Harmony, the connected dreams

subtitles.original: 空へ駆けてゆく
subtitles.english: Galloping towards the sky

subtitles.original: きらめきに乗せて あなたへ
subtitles.english: Riding on the sparkle, to you

subtitles.original: 世界へ響け 愛を
subtitles.english: Resonate to the world, love

subtitles.original: メロディ どこまでも
subtitles.english: Melody, everywhere

subtitles.original: パレット パレット パレット 輝くんだよ
subtitles.english: Palette, Palette, Palette, it's shining

subtitles.original: 呼び合う声を合図に
subtitles.english: With our calling voices as the signal

subtitles.original: パレット パレット パレット 探しに行く
subtitles.english: Palette, Palette, Palette, going to search

subtitles.original: スタートは何度だって
subtitles.english: The start is as many times as it takes

subtitles.original: 独り言 続くただ
subtitles.english: Monologue just continuing

subtitles.original: 始まりたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I simply wanted to begin

subtitles.original: 暗がりに灯った
subtitles.english: Lit up in the darkness

subtitles.original: それは眩しすぎた名前
subtitles.english: That was a name far too dazzling

subtitles.original: それは優しすぎる夜で
subtitles.english: That was a night far too kind

subtitles.original: もっと 近づけて手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: Getting closer, I reached out my hand

subtitles.original: 思いがけず結び合った
subtitles.english: Unexpectedly connected

subtitles.original: ほら 今 僕ら物語になった
subtitles.english: Look, now we've become a story

subtitles.original: パレット パレット パレット 輝くんだよ
subtitles.english: Palette, Palette, Palette, it's shining

subtitles.original: 悔しさも愛おしさも連れておいで
subtitles.english: Bring your frustrations and your dearness with you

subtitles.original: 風に夢 跳ね 飛び立てるさ
subtitles.english: Dreams bouncing in the wind, we can take flight

subtitles.original: ささやかな祈り光り
subtitles.english: Faint prayers shining

subtitles.original: 終わりなき兆し
subtitles.english: Endless signs

subtitles.original: 君を見つけたこと 胸を張れるよう
subtitles.english: So I can be proud of finding you

subtitles.original: ここから これから カラフル パレット パレット パレット
subtitles.english: From here, from now on, colorful Palette, Palette, Palette
